mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.phone, u.role_type AS roleType, u.credit_score AS creditScore, u.level_id AS levelId, COALESCE(l.level_name, 'Lv1 普通用户') AS levelName, COALESCE(u.growth_value, 0) AS growthValue, u.status FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN user_level l ON u.level_id = l.level_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
